INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('a4be0d3e-99c7-487b-8a2f-6927d2a5583c', 'Based on the texts, how would the author of Text 2 most likely respond to Text 1?', 'Text 1
Researchers in 2011 argued that city parks mainly benefit adults who jog or play sports.

Text 2
A 2021 study found that children who live near parks read outdoors more often and report lower stress, even if they rarely exercise there.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"By agreeing that parks only help people who exercise","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Text 2 describes non-exercise benefits, so it would not fully agree."},{"id":"B","text":"By showing parks can benefit residents in ways beyond exercise","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Text 2 emphasizes reading outdoors and lower stress without requiring exercise."},{"id":"C","text":"By claiming children never use parks","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Text 2 says children use parks for reading, not that they avoid parks."},{"id":"D","text":"By rejecting all research about parks","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Text 2 is itself research and does not reject research."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'Text 1 limits park benefits to exercisers. Text 2 documents benefits for children through reading and stress relief without exercise, complicating Text 1''s claim.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Cross-Text Connections', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'CTC', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_template_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

VALUES ('a3777039-efda-4d74-8a1b-394c2a2eca72', 'Based on the texts, how would the author of Text 2 most likely respond to Text 1?', 'Text 1
Researchers in 2015 argued that city parks mainly benefit adults who jog or play sports.

Text 2
A 2025 study found that children who live near parks read outdoors more often and report lower stress, even if they rarely exercise there.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"By agreeing that parks only help people who exercise","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Text 2 describes non-exercise benefits, so it would not fully agree."},{"id":"B","text":"By showing parks can benefit residents in ways beyond exercise","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Text 2 emphasizes reading outdoors and lower stress without requiring exercise."},{"id":"C","text":"By claiming children never use parks","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Text 2 says children use parks for reading, not that they avoid parks."},{"id":"D","text":"By rejecting all research about parks","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Text 2 is itself research and does not reject research."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'Text 1 limits park benefits to exercisers. Text 2 documents benefits for children through reading and stress relief without exercise, complicating Text 1''s claim.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Cross-Text Connections', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'CTC', NULL, 'hard', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_template_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('19993119-120c-4578-b16f-9035d2c7e44e', 'Which choice best states the main idea of the passage?', 'Passage 1: Scientists observed that species in region 1 adapt quickly when temperatures shift by even a few degrees.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"Local species can adapt when temperatures change slightly","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Supported by the passage."},{"id":"B","text":"Temperature never affects species","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicted."},{"id":"C","text":"The passage lists every species on Earth","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Too broad."},{"id":"D","text":"Scientists refuse to study climate","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Not stated."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage focuses on quick adaptation to small temperature shifts.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Words in Context', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'WIC', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_template_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
